听说你的义体攻击天下无双？很抱歉，我连你接口都一起烧掉。
想反过来入侵我？跟我的黑墙AI说去吧。
当绀碧大厦的枪声带走了杰克，也将V推入死亡的倒计时，凯尔绝望地发现，他唯一能抓住的救命稻草，竟是来自黑墙彼岸的低语——那些冰冷、混乱、足以撕裂灵魂的“数据幽灵”。他能否在自身被黑墙吞噬前，从死亡手中抢回V？抑或，这场绝望的拯救，终将点燃夜之城无法承受的残火？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2occ577813df5cbd1f72b178afcc6905e1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"哎写一写吧","author_id":"","book_id":"7497660201277852697","book_name":"赛博朋克：我能掌握黑墙AI","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7518259628262556185","read_count":"403","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"586905"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"148","tags":"科幻末世,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2occ577813df5cbd1f72b178afcc6905e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288054&x-signature=N0Vw7k%2BNpiAvqFJjEAvigZ6FreQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"207146759752231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321224054A14F38BFB6E49C7E0CF5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3973,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2205},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530639062301377304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实还不赖"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753368370
